title: Surgeon Vacancy at Narayana Health South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Narayana Health South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Narayana Health South Asia Partners is actively seeking a talented and motivated Surgeon to join our dynamic team in Delhi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Narayana Health South Asia Partners:
Narayana Health South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Health South Asia Partners!
